identity.name: E1: The Homemade Artisan
identity.description: A warm, inviting, and trustworthy design persona that blends the nostalgia of homemade food with the efficiency of modern tools. Prioritizes clarity, large touch targets, and a 'kitchen-table' friendly aesthetic over cold, tech-heavy interfaces.
key_principles: Warmth over Coolness: Avoid blue/grey tech defaults. Use warm neutrals.
Legibility is Love: Big text, high contrast (but soft blacks), clear hierarchy.
Tactile Feel: UI elements should feel like physical cards or paper labels.
Simplicity First: Hide complexity. Parents shouldn't see database IDs.

primary.description: Terracotta/Spiced Orange - Main actions, buttons, highlights

secondary.description: Slate Blue/Grey - Secondary actions, less urgent UI

grid_system.products: grid grid-cols-1 sm:grid-cols-2 lg:grid-cols-3 xl:grid-cols-4 gap-6

Button.style: rounded-full px-6 py-6 text-lg font-semibold shadow-sm hover:shadow-md transition-all active:scale-95

Card.style: bg-white/80 backdrop-blur-sm border border-stone-100 shadow-[0_2px_8px_rgba(0,0,0,0.04)] hover:shadow-[0_4px_12px_rgba(0,0,0,0.08)] transition-all rounded-2xl overflow-hidden

Input.style: h-12 rounded-xl border-stone-200 bg-stone-50 focus:bg-white focus:ring-2 focus:ring-primary/20 transition-all text-lg

instructions_to_main_agent: 1. THEME SETUP: Implement the 'Warm Earth' theme immediately. Update tailwind.config.js with the provided colors.
2. FONT SETUP: Install @fontsource/fraunces and @fontsource/manrope. Import them in index.js/App.js.
3. NAVIGATION: Build a responsive sidebar. On mobile, it should be a bottom sheet or a hamburger menu. Links: Dashboard, Products, Sales, Customers, Reports.
4. DASHBOARD: Create a 'Welcome back' section. Show 4 key cards: Total Sales (Today), Pending Orders, Low Stock Items, Total Profit. Use large numbers.
5. PRODUCTS PAGE: Use a GRID layout for products, not a table. Each card shows: Image, Name, Price, Stock Badge. Add a big floating '+' button for adding products.
6. SALES ENTRY: This is the most used feature. Make it a dedicated page. Simple form: Select Product (Searchable Dropdown), Quantity, Customer Phone (Auto-fill if exists).
7. ALERTS: Use soft colored badges for 'Low Stock' (e.g., amber background, brown text).
8. CHARTS: Use 'recharts' for a simple 'Sales last 7 days' bar chart on the dashboard. Color bars with the Primary color.
9. MOBILE FIRST: Ensure all buttons are at least 44px height. Padding should be generous.
universal_guidelines: Avoid 'AI Slop': Do not use generic blue gradients. Stick to the Earthy Palette.
Data-Test-IDs: Every button and input must have a data-testid attribute.
No Transparent Backgrounds: Ensure dropdowns and headers have solid or blurred backgrounds.
Micro-interactions: Add active:scale-95 to all buttons.
Empty States: If a list is empty, show a friendly illustration/icon and a message (e.g., 'No sales yet today! Time to sell some laddus?').
